title: audit — HTTP routes
description: Two hosts: tenant (compliance dashboards + retention policy CRUD + export request) + platform-admin (cross-tenant support + regulator export). Every /audits* row-route enforces the audit.enforce_read_only middleware. Retention-policy + export routes are exempted from that middleware because they legitimately need non-GET methods.

groups.name: tenant-audits-read
groups.description: Read-only inspection of audit rows. Compliance-officer scoped.

routes.description: Paginated list. Filters: user_id, auditable_type, auditable_id, event, since, until.
Single audit row detail. Diff blobs redacted by default; ?include=raw_diff reveals + writes a chain-of-custody row.
Full audit trail for a specific entity (Membership, Team, etc). Requires the auditable's own view permission in addition to audit.audits.viewAny.
Actor-scoped audit trail. Compliance investigation of a specific user's mutations.

groups.name: tenant-audit-exports
groups.description: Async export request + list past exports. Not read-only enforced because POST is legitimate here.

routes.description: Request an audit export (DSAR / regulator / legal_hold). Returns 202 + audit_export_id. Rate-limited to 20/day/tenant.
Single export detail. Includes signed_url + signed_url_expires_at when ready.

groups.name: tenant-retention-policies
groups.description: CRUD for tenant-scoped retention overrides. Enterprise-only via audit_retention_extended entitlement.

routes.description: Current retention policy (there is only ever one active per tenant). Returns null-shaped envelope if no policy is active (baseline 7y applies).
Create a retention policy override. Refused if a policy is already active (409). Refused if retention_years > config.audit.retention.max_years (422). Requires override_reason.
Update retention_years, override_ends_at, or override_reason. tenant_id + provider_config_id are immutable.
Soft-delete the policy. Retention resets to config default (7y). Historical policy row preserved for compliance trail.

groups.name: platform-audits
groups.description: Cross-tenant audit reads for platform-admin support + compliance-officer regulator investigations. read-only middleware enforced (POST /export exempted below).

routes.description: Cross-tenant audit list. Compliance-officer + on-call scoped.

groups.name: platform-audit-exports
groups.description: Regulator-issued cross-tenant exports. Distinct rate-limit + audit trail from tenant-plane exports.

routes.description: Regulator-shaped cross-tenant export. Payload includes chain-of-custody metadata + signed manifest. 50/day platform-wide.
